content_type: designed graphic with embedded Truth Social post
description: A vertically composed designed White House graphic on a dark background. The top half is a professional photograph of Donald Trump standing in a White House interior beside tall windows, wearing a dark navy suit, light blue shirt, maroon patterned tie and an American-flag lapel pin, gazing sternly at the camera. Overlaid in large white serif all-caps is the headline 'UFO FILES RELEASED'. Below is a white rounded-rectangle card mimicking a Truth Social post: a small flag-painted circular Trump avatar, bold black name 'Donald J. Trump' with a blue verified badge and black Truth Social square badge, the handle '@realDonaldTrump', and a long body statement with several phrases highlighted in yellow. The text reads: 'As for my promise to you, the Department of War has released the first tranche of the UFO/UAP files to the Public for their review and study. In an effort for Complete and Maximum Transparency, it was my Honor to direct my Administration to identify and provide Government files related to Alien and Extraterrestrial Life, Unidentified Aerial Phenomena, and Unidentified Flying Objects. Whereas previous Administrations have failed to be transparent on this subject, with these new Documents and Videos, the people can decide for themselves, "WHAT THE HELL IS GOING ON?" Have Fun and Enjoy! President DONALD J. TRUMP', followed by the link 'war.gov/UFO'. At the bottom is the engraved 'The WHITE HOUSE' logo. Visual style: polished official poster combining stern portrait, statement screenshot and branding. Messaging/propaganda technique: framing the administration as uniquely transparent ('Complete and Maximum Transparency') versus 'previous Administrations', leveraging populist intrigue and a viral hook ('WHAT THE HELL IS GOING ON?') to generate engagement around a UFO/UAP file release. Target audience: the general public and online curiosity-seekers, casting Trump as a truth-teller and disruptor.
notable_text: UFO FILES RELEASED | the Department of War has released the first tranche of the UFO/UAP files to the Public... Complete and Maximum Transparency... the people can decide for themselves, 'WHAT THE HELL IS GOING ON?' Have Fun and Enjoy! President DONALD J. TRUMP | war.gov/UFO
